framework.name: Security Incident Response Service Provider Requirements (PRIS)
framework.name_nl: Referentiel d'exigences pour les prestataires de reponse aux incidents de securite (PRIS)
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Qualification requirements for providers performing incident response, digital forensics, and crisis management
framework.structure_description: Requirements for incident response readiness, triage, containment, eradication, recovery, forensic analysis, and post-incident reporting.

controls.title: Incident response team structure
controls.title_nl: Structure de l'equipe de reponse aux incidents
controls.description: The provider shall maintain a dedicated incident response team with defined roles: team lead, analysts, forensic experts.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit maintenir une equipe de reponse aux incidents dediee avec des roles definis : chef d'equipe, analystes, experts forensiques.

controls.title: On-call availability
controls.description: The provider shall guarantee response capability with defined maximum response times, including outside business hours.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit garantir une capacite de reponse avec des temps de reponse maximaux definis, y compris en dehors des heures ouvrables.

controls.title: Engagement protocols
controls.description: Formal engagement protocols shall define scope, authorization, legal considerations, and chain of custody from the start.
controls.description_nl: Des protocoles d'engagement formels doivent definir le perimetre, les autorisations, les considerations juridiques et la chaine de conservation des preuves des le debut.

controls.title: Incident responder qualifications
controls.description: Incident responders shall demonstrate competence in malware analysis, network forensics, and system investigation.
controls.description_nl: Les intervenants doivent demontrer leur competence en analyse de programmes malveillants, forensique reseau et investigation systeme.

controls.title: Legal and regulatory knowledge
controls.description: Responders shall be trained on legal requirements for evidence handling, data protection, and mandatory notifications.
controls.description_nl: Les intervenants doivent etre formes aux exigences legales pour la gestion des preuves, la protection des donnees et les notifications obligatoires.

controls.title: Initial triage procedure
controls.description: A documented triage procedure shall classify incident severity and determine resource allocation within defined timeframes.
controls.description_nl: Une procedure de tri documentee doit classifier la severite de l'incident et determiner l'allocation des ressources dans des delais definis.

controls.title: Scope assessment
controls.description: Rapid scope assessment shall determine affected systems, data exposure, and lateral movement indicators.
controls.description_nl: Une evaluation rapide du perimetre doit determiner les systemes affectes, l'exposition des donnees et les indicateurs de mouvement lateral.

controls.title: Containment strategy
controls.description: The provider shall implement containment measures proportional to incident severity while preserving forensic evidence.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit mettre en oeuvre des mesures de confinement proportionnelles a la severite de l'incident tout en preservant les preuves forensiques.

controls.title: Network isolation capabilities
controls.description: The provider shall be able to advise on and implement network isolation of compromised segments.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit etre capable de conseiller et mettre en oeuvre l'isolation reseau des segments compromis.

controls.title: Digital forensic methodology
controls.description: Digital forensic analysis shall follow recognized standards (ISO 27037, RFC 3227) with documented chain of custody.
controls.description_nl: L'analyse forensique numerique doit suivre des normes reconnues (ISO 27037, RFC 3227) avec une chaine de conservation documentee.

controls.title: Evidence preservation
controls.description: All forensic evidence shall be collected, hashed, and stored in a manner admissible in legal proceedings.
controls.description_nl: Toutes les preuves forensiques doivent etre collectees, hachees et stockees de maniere recevable dans les procedures judiciaires.

controls.title: Malware analysis capability
controls.description: The provider shall have capability for static and dynamic malware analysis in isolated environments.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit avoir la capacite d'analyse statique et dynamique de programmes malveillants dans des environnements isoles.

controls.title: Recovery planning
controls.description: The provider shall assist in developing recovery plans ensuring clean system restoration and monitoring for re-compromise.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit assister dans l'elaboration de plans de recuperation assurant la restauration saine des systemes et la surveillance de re-compromission.

controls.title: Incident report production
controls.description: A detailed incident report shall include timeline, attack chain, impact assessment, indicators of compromise, and recommendations.
controls.description_nl: Un rapport d'incident detaille doit inclure la chronologie, la chaine d'attaque, l'evaluation d'impact, les indicateurs de compromission et les recommandations.

controls.title: Lessons learned facilitation
controls.description: The provider shall facilitate a post-incident lessons learned session and produce actionable improvement recommendations.
controls.description_nl: Le prestataire doit animer une session de retour d'experience post-incident et produire des recommandations d'amelioration actionnables.
